goal: Build a multi-AMR corridor: 3 Nova Carter AMRs navigate corridor, avoid each other, perform handoff. Realizes Phase 10 yrkesroll #16 (multi-AMR fleet logistics persona).
thoughts: 3 AMRs in narrow corridor. Each AMR is moving obstacle for the others. Must coordinate to avoid collision.
register_moving_obstacle pattern (CP-68) extended to AMR fleet.
navigate_to per AMR; goal is sequential pass through corridor.
For V0: AMRs navigate at known times offset from each other (no real coordination).
Function-gate: each AMR reaches its goal pose.
code:
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

create_prim(prim_path="/World/CorridorL", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, -1.0, 0.50], scale=[5.0, 0.10, 1.0])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/CorridorL", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

create_prim(prim_path="/World/CorridorR", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 1.0, 0.50], scale=[5.0, 0.10, 1.0])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/CorridorR", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

for i, x in enumerate([-2.0, -0.5, 1.0]):
    create_wheeled_robot(
        robot_name="nova_carter",
        dest_path=f"/World/Carter_{i+1}",
        position=[x, 0, 0.10],
    )

register_moving_obstacle(robot_path="/World/Carter_1", obstacle_path="/World/Carter_2")
register_moving_obstacle(robot_path="/World/Carter_1", obstacle_path="/World/Carter_3")
register_moving_obstacle(robot_path="/World/Carter_2", obstacle_path="/World/Carter_1")
register_moving_obstacle(robot_path="/World/Carter_2", obstacle_path="/World/Carter_3")
register_moving_obstacle(robot_path="/World/Carter_3", obstacle_path="/World/Carter_1")
register_moving_obstacle(robot_path="/World/Carter_3", obstacle_path="/World/Carter_2")

navigate_to(robot_path="/World/Carter_1", goal_position=[2.0, 0, 0.10])
navigate_to(robot_path="/World/Carter_2", goal_position=[-2.0, 0, 0.10])
navigate_to(robot_path="/World/Carter_3", goal_position=[2.0, 0.3, 0.10])
extends_notes: Multi-AMR canonical. Tests fleet coordination via register_moving_obstacle.
extension_notes: Multi-AMR canonical. Tests fleet coordination via register_moving_obstacle. Function-gate N/A — AMR navigation, not cube delivery. Validation = each Carter reaches its goal_position within 30s.
failure_modes: create_wheeled_robot for 3 instances may exhaust GPU memory if Carter is heavy mesh
navigate_to without ROS2 nav2 may use simple Vector-to-goal (collision unaware)
AMR fleet coordination — without claim mutex, AMRs may collide in narrow corridor
verified_status: draft (Phase 10 #16; needs Carter SimReady + nav2 or simple navigate_to)
